hooks.prompt: Check if the conversation involved implementing UI changes (editing .tsx, .css, or component files). If yes, verify that mcp__claude-in-chrome__* tools were used to test the implementation (navigate, screenshot, read_console_messages). If UI work was done but no browser testing occurred, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "UI implementation detected but no browser testing was performed. Use Claude in Chrome tools to verify the changes work before stopping."}. Otherwise respond with {"ok": true}.
